figures.caption: Table 1. Performance comparison of multivariate time series forecasting with state-of-the-art baselines on the public benchmark datasets. We set forecasting horizon H ∈ {96, 192, 336, 720} for all methods and report the average. The results are mostly taken from previous studies [7].

Fig. 1. Comparison of retrieval strategies. In channelagnostic retrieval, all variables use the same retrieved multivariate segment. In channel-wise retrieval (ours), each variable independently retrieves its own references, respecting heterogeneity across variables.
